EmailTemplate.description: Email to use when a customer already holds an IR35 Protect policy and we want to try and upsell them an insurance scheme package.
EmailTemplate.name: PI Elsewhere_SDR
EmailTemplate.subject: Want a cheaper rate on a combined insurance policy?
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Lead.FirstName},
You currently hold an IR35 Protect policy with us.
Did you know that as a current Kingsbridge customer you are entitled to a cheaper rate on a combined insurance policy?
I’d love to build you a business insurance package, so you have all the business cover you need wrapped into one single neat, affordable payment.
It only takes 5-10 minutes to provide you with a comprehensive no-obligation quote. Not ready for a quote yet? Book a call with me closer to your renewal date - https://calendly.com/d/cm3g-k74-js2/kingsbridge-insurance-call-back
Alternatively, let me know your renewal date so I can contact you nearer the time.
I look forward to hearing from you.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Sales Team
E: salesteam@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808740
